rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts, assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Refer to component ports only through valid variables or outputs in component type contracts
Use visible identifiers and named constants when specifying bounds or relations in AGREE contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Implementation scope contracts may use assign for output bindings but not guarantee statements
Component type contracts should express input assumptions and output guarantees using visible features
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
